summary: Iteration 98: Comprehensive testing of PWA Push Notifications, Concierge® Experiences on Dine/Celebrate pages, and Mobile UI responsiveness. All backend APIs pass (13/13). Frontend features working correctly.

push_stats.details: Returns subscription counts and recent notifications

preview.details: Returns preview or no pets message

websocket_health.details: Returns healthy status with connection stats

dine_page.details: Dine page loads with Elevated Concierge® section, 3 experience cards (Private Chef, Restaurant VIP, Birthday Dining), dialog opens on click

celebrate_page.details: Celebrate page loads with 6 Concierge® experience cards (Ultimate Birthday Bash, Gotcha Day Special, Pawty Planning Pro, Puppy Shower, Pet Wedding Ceremony, Milestone Moments)

concierge_experience_card.details: ConciergeExperienceCard component opens dialog with message textarea, contact fields, and 'Start Conversation' button

mobile_dashboard.details: Dashboard displays correctly on mobile with gamification banner, tabs, and proper layout

mobile_mira_chat.details: Mira AI chat page responsive, no horizontal overflow, quick action buttons visible

push_notification_ui.details: Push Notifications section with PWA badge, enable switch, and Soul Whisper™ section visible

member_login.details: Member login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 works correctly

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed push subscriptions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 verified: 1) PWA Push Notification system fully functional - VAPID keys auto-generated, subscription/unsubscription working, Soul Whisper preview endpoint working. 2) Dine page has 3 Elevated Concierge® experience cards with working dialog. 3) Celebrate page (new) has 6 Concierge® experience cards. 4) ConciergeExperienceCard component opens dialog and submits to /api/concierge/experience-request. 5) Mobile UI responsive on dashboard and Mira chat (tested at 390x844). 6) Push Notification UI in Settings tab with PWA badge and Soul Whisper section.
